title: AI Latency Phase 2
description: Critic dedup (JSON critic + confidence gate), event-driven durable-worker recovery (next/server after()), and a due-job index (dark-launch + parity + flip).
rollbackSteps: Rollback: git revert -m 1 a8e0584ff0ef390a4baf6cda8ebdd4bed6885aac (the PR #8 merge). All four latency flags (OPERION_CRITIC_JSON / OPERION_EVENT_ENQUEUE / OPERION_DUE_INDEX{,_DARK_LAUNCH}) default OFF ⇒ additive + inert.
For the index: dark-launch parity must be clean before any downstream flip; backfillDueIndex() first.
compatibilityNotes: Measured via OBS-001 observability layer — port OBS-001 first (dependency).
Redis due-index uses a ZSET; verify downstream Upstash wiring.

history.note: Landed in the Supercharged parity release PR #8 (eaab4b3 latency Phase 2 backend); bundle re-verified green (tsc/462 tests/117 ai/regression/build, flags OFF) and merged as a8e0584ff0ef390a4baf6cda8ebdd4bed6885aac. Discovery→merged recorded as a bundled reconciliation transition (the parity foundation was validated and merged as one unit).

verification.summary: PR #8 bundle re-verified against head da5fdc8: tsc 0 errors; eslint changed-files 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings); full suite 462/462; test:ai 117/117; ai-regression 2/2; next build ✓ compiled successfully; all new flags default OFF (flag-off = byte-identical).
